title: A Site Jungle Smoke from T Spawn
summary: Smoke off jungle to allow safe A push from T side

position.caption: Stand at top mid near the T ramp corner

aim.caption: Aim at the antenna on the rooftop

position: Stand at the right edge of the ramp entrance
aim: Look up toward the large rooftop antenna
Crosshair at the base of the antenna
Fine-tune slightly left

text: Hold W and release at jump peak

title: CT Smoke from Top Mid
summary: Smoke CT from top mid to push short or execute A

position.caption: Stand at top mid T side

aim.caption: Aim at the ledge of the CT building

effect.caption: CT is blocked from mid view

position: Reach top mid from T side
Stand against the left wall at top mid
aim: Look toward the CT building rooftop
Align with the corner of the rooftop parapet
Keep it steady

text: Smoke will arc perfectly into CT area

title: Mid Window Smoke from T Spawn
summary: Smoke the window room to allow safe mid presence

position.caption: Stand at T spawn near the van

aim.caption: Aim just above the window room ledge

position: Stand next to the van on the right side
aim: Look up toward window room
Crosshair on the upper left corner of the window frame
Slight adjustment for wind

throw.timingNote: Throw when going to take mid control

title: A Short Pop Flash
summary: Pop flash over the short wall to blind CT on A site

position.caption: Stand at bottom of A ramp

aim.caption: Aim above the short wall corner

position: Stop at the bottom of short
aim: Look up at about 60 degrees
Aim just above the short wall top edge
The flash will arc over and pop on CT side

text: Right-click soft lob over the wall
Time it so teammates are ready to push
throw.timingNote: Call for push immediately after throwing

title: B Site Van Smoke
summary: Smoke the van on B site to push B from apartments

aim.caption: Aim at the chimney above van

position: Stand at the doorframe of B apartments exit
aim: Look at the chimney on the rooftop above van
Aim at the top left of the chimney
Small adjustment needed

throw.timingNote: Throw when ready to push B

title: B Apartments Molotov from CT
summary: CT-side molotov thrown into B apartments to slow down rush

position.caption: Stand at B CT position near bench

aim: Aim at the upper section of the apartments exit window
Slightly above the frame

text: Molotov will land at apartments exit
throw.timingNote: Throw when hearing B apartments rush

title: A Short Corner HE
summary: HE grenade to damage Ts pushing from short onto A site

position.caption: CT position on A site platform

aim.caption: Aim at the top of short wall

position: Start at CT A site default
Stand at the platform near the pillar
aim: Look at the top of the short connector wall
Crosshair just above the wall top

text: Grenade will clear the wall and burst at short
throw.timingNote: Throw when Ts are pushing short

title: Jungle Flash for A Execute
summary: Flash thrown to blind CT in jungle during A execute

position.caption: Stand at T ramp near top

aim.caption: Aim at the jungle rooftop wall

position: Push up T ramp to near top
aim: Look at the upper right corner of the jungle wall
Aim just at the corner edge

text: Flash pops right in front of jungle CT

title: Ticket Booth Smoke from B Apps
summary: Smoke off the ticket booth angle from B apartments

position.caption: Position in B apartments upper floor

aim.caption: Aim at the small gap in the rooftop

position: Stand at the corner window position
Align body with the left wall
aim: Look up at a very steep angle
Aim at the tiny gap between the two rooftops
This lineup requires pixel-perfect aim

text: Jumpthrow is mandatory for this lineup
throw.timingNote: Practice this in DM mode first

title: CT to A Site Flash
summary: CT flash to support retake from CT spawn area

position.caption: Stand at CT spawn near A site entrance

aim.caption: Aim above the A site ramp wall

effect.caption: T side on A site is blinded

position: Move to just outside A site CT entrance
aim: Look above the A site ramp wall top
Aim at the sky just above the corner

text: Flash pops on A site ramp side
throw.timingNote: Use during retake to blind T side
